title: Color Sort Puzzle
description: Sort the colored balls into tubes so each tube contains only one color. A relaxing yet challenging brain puzzle game. Free, no download needed.

howToUse.label: Select a tube
howToUse.description: Tap any tube to select it. The selected tube lifts up slightly to show it is active.

howToUse.label: Move a ball
howToUse.description: Tap another tube to move the top ball there. You can only move onto an empty tube, or onto one whose top ball matches and has space.

howToUse.label: Sort all colors
howToUse.description: Keep moving balls until each tube contains only one color or is empty. Use Undo anytime to backtrack.

howToUse.label: Clear the puzzle
howToUse.description: All tubes sorted? The puzzle is complete! Tap Next Level for a fresh challenge with more colors.
